verses.text: Sanggamte aw, a taktakin ci lehang, kha nuntakna a nei mite tungah thugen bangin ka hong gen thei kei hi. Leitung mite tungah thugen bang leh Khrih upna sungah naungek a bangte tungah thugen bangin ka hong gen ding kisam hi
Note in antak nezo nailo na hih manun nawitui ka hong tulh hi. Tu mahmahin zong nawi bek mah tulhding a kisam lai na hi uh hi

Bang hang hiam cih leh Pasian' deihna bangin gamta loin, leitung lungsim deihna bangin gamta lai na hih manun upna sungah naungek bang ahi lai na hi uh hi. Note khatlekhat kihaza-in kitawng kiselin na om uh ciangin hih leitung mite mah a bang lel na hihna uh hong kilang hi
Pawlkhat in, “Keimah, Paul' pawl ka hi hi,” ci-in, pawlkhat in, “Apollos' pawl ka hi hi,” na cih uh ciangin leitung mi mawkmawkte mah bangin a gamta na hi uh hi

A taktakin ci lehang, Apollos i cihte, Paul i cihte, bangpi hi zenzen ka hi uh hiam? Note in thu na uptheihna dingun Pasian' nasemte ka hi lel uh hi. Topa in kote' sepdingin a hong piak nasep tuak a sem ka hi lel uh hi
Keima nasep pen khaici vawh hi a, Apollos' nasep pen tuibuah hi a, ahi zongin a khangsakpa ahih leh Pasian ahi hi
Khaici vawhpa leh tuibuakpa a thupi hilo a, a khangsak Pasian a thupi hi bek hi
Khaici vawhpa leh tuibuakpa a kizakim ahi hi. Pasian in komau sepna tuak tawh kizui-in thaman hong pia ding hi
Kote pen Pasian-a' dingin na a semkhawm mite ka hi uh a, note pen Pasian' lo na hi uh hi. Note pen Pasian' inn zong na hi uh hi

Pasian in kei tungah a hong piak siamna zangin, innlam siamte' nasepteng semin, a khuam thupiteng ka phut a, Apollos in tua khuam phuhsa tungah innlam a zom hi. Tua khuam tungah inn a lampa a kingaihsut mahmah ding kisam hi
Keima phuhsa khuam thupiteng ahi Jesuh Khrih cih simloh kuamah dang in khuam thupi dang phutthei nawnlo ding hi
Ahi zongin tua khuam tungah kham, ngun, suangmanpha, sing, bi, lopa, a nam tuamtuam kilam thei hi
Tua a kilam nate mei tawh a kize-et ding Ni hong tung ding a, tua nasepnate a bangci hiam, ci-in mei in ze-et ding ahih manin a lam mite' nasep ciat hong kilang ding hi
Mi khat in tua khuamte tungah a lam nate bangmah a cihzawh kei leh a nasep thaman a ngah ding hi
Ahi zongin mi khat in a lam nate a kattum leh amah a sum hi ding hi. Tua nate a lampa ahih leh meikatna ding panin a suakta bang keekin a suakta bek ding hi
Note pen Pasian' biakinn na hihna uh leh note sungah Pasian' Kha Siangtho a teng ahih lamtak na theihsa uh ahi hi
Mi khatpeuh in Pasian' biakinn susia leh Pasian in tua mipa susia ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Pasian' biakinn a siangtho hi a, note zong tua biakinn siangtho na hi uh hi
Note khatpeuh hih leitung ngeina-ah a pilin na kingaihsut uh leh a pil taktak na hih theihna dingun a hai na suak phot un
Hih leitung mite in pilna hi, ci-in a ngaihsutte, Pasian-a' dingin a haihuai thu ahi hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Lai Siangtho in, “Mipilte amau' ngian mahah awksak hi,” a na ci hi
Tua ciangin, “Mipilte' ngaihsutna a mawkna hi, ci-in Topa in a thei hi,” ci-in zong na gen lai hi
Tua ahih manin kuamah in midangte' siamna kisialhpih kei un. A taktakin ci lehang na khempeuh nomau-a' hizaw hi
Paul, Apollos, Peter cihte ahi a, hih leitung, nuntakna, sihna, tuhun leh mailam hun, cihte-a kipan na khempeuh nomau-a' ahi hi
Note pen Khrih-a' na hi uh a, Khrih pen Pasian-a' ahi hi.
